text:
On Tue, Nov 30, 2010 at 08:10:13PM +0000, Gerrit Beine wrote:
>  Great work, please commit it!
>  
>  Best regards
>  
>  Gerrit

Thanks Gerrit!

Unfortunately it looks like ireport depends on springframework and needs
version 2.5.  I'll do some testing to see if it will work with 3, but
googling indicates it won't.  In that case I'll probably create a
springframework3 port (which I was hoping to avoid).
